<tool_call>{"name": "add_content_after_line", "arguments": {"file_path": "cJSON.c", "line_number": 2167, "content": "
/* Get number of items in a JSON object. Returns -1 if not an object. */
CJSON_PUBLIC(int) cJSON_GetObjectItemCount(const cJSON *object)
{
    cJSON *child = NULL;
    int count = 0;

    if (object == NULL || !cJSON_IsObject(object))
    {
        return -1;
    }

    child = object->child;
    while (child != NULL)
    {
        count++;
        child = child->next;
    }

    return count;
}
"}}</tool_call>
